description:
This advanced PostgreSQL quiz tests deep knowledge of both common and lesser-known features, including JOIN operations, NULL handling, ANSI SQL compliance, transactions, internals, indexing, and data sampling. It challenges users with technical gotchas and requires problem-solving skills, using an encouraging and engaging teaching tone with emojis and motivational language.
Topics: JOIN, NULL, ANSI SQL, Transactions, Internals, Indexing, Data Sampling
Audience: Experienced PostgreSQL developers and database administrators seeking to validate or expand their expertise in advanced SQL concepts and system internals.
